_comment: Declared, VERIFIED facts about Scheduler for the growth agents (conversion / ASO / content). Source of truth for drafts so agents never invent or over-claim. Drafts only — a human reviews before anything goes live. CRITICAL: do NOT claim features Scheduler does not ship (time tracking / AI scheduling) — a directory submission already over-claimed those.

product.what_it_is: B2B shift scheduling for small businesses (~10-100 employees)

positioning_problem: The store listing markets a generic to-do / checklist app, but the product is monetized as B2B shift scheduling. Mispositioned. Reposition to shift scheduling for SMB teams (this is an ASO/listing change — no app release required).
revenue_levers: Reposition the store listing to shift scheduling (ASO copy + screenshots; no app release)
Configure the free trial (not configured in RevenueCat today)

funnel_baseline.note: The core revenue problem: lots of installs/customers, almost no paid conversion. The conversion_growth_analyst proposes experiments to move this.

pricing._uncertain: Confirm which point is monthly vs a higher tier; annual not offered today.
